examples.title: Q-Learning Implementation
examples.description: Complete Q-learning implementation for a grid world environment.
examples.explanation: Complete Q-learning implementation with epsilon-greedy exploration, learning rate, and epsilon decay. The update uses max Q(s',a) which makes it off-policy.

examples.title: Q-Learning in Java
examples.explanation: Java Q-learning agent with encapsulated Q-table, epsilon-greedy action selection, and the off-policy update rule using max over next state actions.

examples.title: Q-Learning in C
examples.explanation: Efficient C implementation with static Q-table array. Shows the core Q-learning update with max over next state Q-values.
